# Network Monitoring

Manage OCI Network Monitoring path analyzer tests from Kubernetes with a reviewed controller-backed runtime.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `vnmonitoring` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-vnmonitoring-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-vnmonitoring:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-vnmonitoring-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |

## Notes

- Current package scope is intentionally limited to PathAnalyzerTest while path analyses, work-request helper families, and the separate change-compartment action stay unpublished.
- The published runtime uses synchronous read-after-write follow-up semantics, paginated exact-match reuse on displayName plus endpoint and protocol identity within one compartment, and explicit in-place updates for endpoint, protocol, query-option, and tag fields.
- No checked-in release manifest currently lists this package; the resource scope below reflects the current repository package metadata.
- This package is currently hidden from the Supported Resources landing page until a checked-in release manifest promotes it to the customer-visible surface.
